summary.scan_excluded_notes: useBodyScrollLock.ts is empty (0 lines) — likely dead-code stub. The real body-scroll-lock implementation is duplicated inline in src/sections/home/PostSection.tsx (lines 5-14) and src/components/AiDevKitModal/index.tsx (lines 24-41). Flag during refactor: extract to a single hook. converter.ts contains only a one-line capitalizeFirst helper with no current importers (0 hits in src/) — possible dead code.

top_priority.rationale: 671 LOC of pure-layout SVG arrow math + hand-tuned loop node coordinates; any token/style refactor risks silently breaking diagram geometry with zero visible test coverage.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders one FlowStepCard per step in linear mode (no loops)
renders Step N+1 label using 1-based index from item.index
highlights cards whose index appears in a loop range
splits steps into preLoop / loop cluster / postLoop when a backward loop (fromStep > toStep) is supplied
ignores loop entries whose fromStep/toStep fall outside the steps array
renders nothing when steps.length === 0
renders both desktop (md:block) and mobile (md:hidden) variants in the same output
renders LoopLabels only for loops that have a label

top_priority.rationale: 910 LOC, 9 hooks, 4 tabs, framer-motion AnimatePresence, loads localized resume data and renders many conditional branches per tab — the single biggest characterization gap in the app.
key_behaviors_to_lock: defaults the active tab to 'basics' on mount
switching tabs swaps the rendered block (workSkills / education / awardsAndCerts)
WorkBlock starts with openWorkIdx=0 and lets user toggle highlight/section open state
SkillsBlock renders one chip per group.items entry, grouped by category label
renders resume profile links in the order ['website','blog','github','linkedin'] when present
navigate is invoked when the resume CTA is clicked
loadLocalizedResumeProfile result drives the rendered tabs (loading / loaded states)

top_priority.rationale: Used inside the projects grid; combines 3D flip CSS, hover-driven state, claudeInfo badge, stickerText badge, and image error fallback — a refactor target for tokens (rounded-card, accent-*, shadow) and easy to break.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders project.title, project.subtitle, projectType through useTranslation('projects')
renders the first screenshot src; falls back to placehold.co URL when screenshots is empty
onError handler swaps the img src to the not-found placeholder and clears onerror
click on the card invokes onClick prop and resets isFlipped to false
mouseEnter sets isFlipped=true (front -> back rotateY(180deg))
renders the Vibe sparkle badge only when project.claudeInfo is truthy
renders the stickerText sticker only when project.stickerText is truthy
renders one tech-stack chip per techStack entry on the back face

top_priority.rationale: Drives the entire project grid entrance animation: layout effect measures DOM positions, intersection-observer (useInView) gates state transitions, and timer schedules AI dev-kit reveal — multiple race conditions to lock down.
key_behaviors_to_lock: exposes projectsGridRef and projectCardRefs that can be attached to DOM nodes
projectCardOffsetsReady becomes true only once every project has an offset entry
hasPlayedProjectEntrance flips to true after offsets are ready AND the grid is in view
showAiDevKit becomes true after a delay scaled by projects.length once entrance has played
cardVariants.cluster returns offset-driven {x, y, zIndex} when offsets exist, fallback when not
cardVariants.exit returns scale:1.5 for the selectedId card and opacity:0 for others
removes the resize listener and clears timers on unmount

top_priority.rationale: Heavy framer-motion useScroll/useTransform with 12 hand-tuned scroll ranges driving opacity of background, intro lines, four start images, three end images, and a nested AnswerChecker — every transform is a magic number that any refactor will perturb.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders introLine1 / introLine1-1 / introLine2 / introLine2-1 translation keys
renders all 7 intro images (4 start + 3 end) as with the documented src paths
wraps content in a section with h-[2000vh] sticky/scroll container
renders the inner AnswerChecker only inside the xl:inline branch
section ref is forwarded to the targetRef element so useScroll can attach

top_priority.rationale: Top-level home section composing six children (PortfolioCard, PreparingCard, AiDevKitModal, two sidebars) and orchestrating 3 hooks; the central refactor surface for the grid layout tokens.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders 4 skeleton placeholders while useProjectLists isLoading
after loading, renders one PortfolioCard per project from useProjectLists
renders one PreparingCard per preparingProject in the second section
clicking a card sets selectedId then navigates to /project/:id after 300ms
renders ProjectsSidebar with projects, devKitItems, hasPlayedProjectEntrance, showAiDevKit
AiDevKitModal receives item=null until a dev-kit card is clicked, then receives the matching item

top_priority.rationale: 432 LOC of conditional layouts (skill-groups, flow steps, grouped detail sections, 5 SectionIcon variants) — pure visual surface that token refactors will silently mutate.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders skillItems grouped by category when section.layout === 'skill-groups'
renders SkillFlowSteps with 'Step N' labels when section.steps is non-empty
renders 5 distinct SectionIcon SVG variants based on (index % 5)
expand/collapse toggle reveals chips and detail content (useState driven)
renders nothing for SkillFlowSteps when steps array is empty

top_priority.rationale: 288 LOC, expand/collapse toggles per item, embeds FlowDiagram for diagram layout, renders chips/steps/groups conditionally — refactor of tokens or layout will easily flip ordering.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders DetailItemHeading with title and optional description per item
renders chips only when item.chips is non-empty
renders numbered StepBadges only when item.steps is non-empty
renders DetailGroupGrid only when item.groups is non-empty
embeds FlowDiagram when section.layout === 'diagram' or 'flow'
expand/collapse state is per-item and toggled by ChevronIcon click

top_priority.rationale: Renders the entire project-detail summary (5 SummaryPart variants, copy-link toast flow, GitHub/Demo/Notion buttons) and uses navigator.clipboard — high blast radius for any rounded-modal/border refactor.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders each summaryPart kind: 'text', 'subtitle', 'image', 'image-group', 'link'
renders only present LinkButtons (github / demo / notion)
renders InfoCells only for present overview fields (period, projectType, role, other)
clicking a subtitle calls navigator.clipboard.writeText with origin+pathname#id
successful copy shows ToastNotification with linkCopied message and isSuccess=true
failed copy shows the linkCopyFailed message and isSuccess=false
toast auto-clears after 3000ms

top_priority.rationale: Site-wide header with tabs, language dropdown, outside-click effect — high reuse and many active-state class combinations that will move with token refactor.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders 4 tab links: about, projects, posts, profile
active tab gets bg-slate-900 and text-white classes; inactive tabs do not
clicking Info button invokes setModalOpen prop
clicking the language toggle opens the dropdown; clicking again closes it
selecting 한국어/English calls i18n.changeLanguage('ko'|'en') and closes the dropdown
click outside the dropdown closes it (mousedown listener)
current language label receives bold + text-accent-600 classes

top_priority.rationale: ContentEditable input + per-character correctness comparison; refactoring color tokens (green-200/red-200) or button classes risks breaking the visible result.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders the correctAnswer as the problem label
Check button fills the result list with one ResultCharacter per typed char
each ResultCharacter sets isCorrect=true when char === correctAnswer[index]
Clear button empties the result and clears the contentEditable innerText
Check is a no-op when the input is empty or whitespace-only
mouseEnter on a button blurs the contentEditable when input is non-empty

top_priority.rationale: Modal entry point that locks body scroll, binds Escape key, and stops backdrop-click propagation — core dialog behavior that any restructure can silently break.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders nothing when item is null
sets document.body.style.overflow = 'hidden' while open and restores on unmount
binds a keydown listener that calls onClose when Escape is pressed
clicking the backdrop calls onClose; clicking the inner panel does not
renders one DetailSection per item.sections entry
ModalHeader receives the same item and onClose props

top_priority.rationale: Tiny but timer-driven; drives the visible homepage preview flip. Resetting projectCount or intervalMs is the only source of state change so it's a clean characterization target.
key_behaviors_to_lock: initial activeProjectIndex=0 and isFlipped=false
stepIndex resets to 0 when projectCount changes
no interval is started when projectCount === 0
after intervalMs the stepIndex advances and isFlipped flips between true/false
stepIndex wraps around (projectCount * 2) modulo
interval is cleared on unmount and on projectCount/intervalMs change

top_priority.rationale: Sister component to PortfolioCard; shares the same dashed-border, rounded-card and grayscale styling that token consolidation will touch. Two consumers means a regression hits both.
key_behaviors_to_lock: renders project.title and project.subtitle through useTranslation('prepareProjects')
renders the placehold.co Coming+Soon image as the thumbnail
renders the comingSoon translation key as the badge label
image onError swaps src to the not-found placeholder and clears onerror
applies the dashed border and grayscale classes to the card container

incidental_findings: DEAD CODE CANDIDATES: src/hooks/useBodyScrollLock.ts is a 0-line empty file. src/utils/converter.ts (capitalizeFirst), src/components/TotalProjectCard/index.tsx, src/components/InfoIcon.tsx, src/hooks/useIntersectionObserver.ts, and src/sections/home/CrazyAboutSection.tsx all return zero importers via the basename grep — verify before refactor begins.

DUPLICATED LOGIC: an inline body-scroll-lock hook is reimplemented in src/sections/home/PostSection.tsx (lines 5-14) AND in src/components/AiDevKitModal/index.tsx (lines 24-41). Prime extraction target for Phase 1 — but only safe once those two consumers have render tests.

DUPLICATED LOGIC: PortfolioCard (src/components/PortfolioCard/index.tsx) and ProjectFlipPreviewCard (src/components/ProjectFlipPreviewCard.tsx) duplicate the same 3D flip CSS pattern (perspective:1000px, backfaceVisibility:hidden, rotateY transform). Candidate for a shared FlippableCard primitive.
DUPLICATED LOGIC: handleImageError fallback to placehold.co is repeated in PortfolioCard, PreparingCard, and ProjectFlipPreviewCard with slightly different placeholder URLs.
TYPO: src/components/AboutMe/ShootingStart.tsx file/component name is almost certainly meant to be 'ShootingStar'.

MAGIC NUMBERS: src/components/AiDevKitModal/FlowDiagram.tsx contains hand-tuned coordinate tables (getLoopNodePositions for loopSize 2/3/4) that have no test coverage — extracting to a layout helper before testing would be high-risk; tests must come first.
PROJECT_CARD_EASE constant is exported from src/hooks/useProjectGridEntrance.ts and re-imported by src/components/ProjectsSidebar.tsx — minor cross-layer coupling worth flagging during refactor.
